project_type: Python PySide6 desktop app (Darts League management)
build_system: No formal build system - direct pytest/mypy execution
test_framework: pytest with pytest.mark.integration, tmp_path for DB, get_connection(tmp_path / 'name.db')
verification_instructions: 1) Run mypy: python -m mypy app/ tests/ --ignore-missing-imports. 2) Run pytest: python -m pytest -x -q. 3) Check 136+ tests pass.
setup_instructions: Already set up. Python 3.11 with PySide6, openpyxl, pytest, mypy installed.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - no restrictions. PySide6 tests that need display are skipped (no QApplication in CI).
contribution_requirements: All UI text in Russian. mypy clean. pytest green. Don't break existing tests. Don't mix coach tasks with tournaments. Log key decisions in logs/.
key_patterns: Services: dataclass for results, connection as parameter. UI: QDialog for forms, QTableWidget for lists, tooltips on buttons. Schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS, migrations via _column_exists. Repositories: class-based with create/list/get/search methods. Audit: AuditLogService(connection).log_event(). Labels: labels.py maps codes to Russian. Tests: pytest.mark.integration, tmp_path for DB.
directory_structure: app/ - main application code. app/db/ - schema, repositories, database module. app/services/ - business logic services. app/ui/ - PySide6 UI widgets/dialogs. app/domain/ - domain logic (points, rating). tests/ - pytest test files. logs/ - development logs. planning/ - planning docs.
